name: awx-mcp-server
description: Control AWX/Ansible Tower through the Model Context Protocol. Manage infrastructure automation with natural language.
long_description: AWX MCP Server enables AI agents and assistants to interact with AWX/Ansible Tower instances through the Model Context Protocol. Execute playbooks, manage inventories, monitor jobs, and automate infrastructure tasks using natural language with GitHub Copilot, Claude, Cursor, or any MCP-compatible client.

awx_base_url.title: AWX Base URL
awx_base_url.description: The base URL of your AWX/Ansible Tower instance (e.g., https://awx.example.com)

awx_token.title: AWX API Token
awx_token.description: Your AWX API token for authentication. Generate this in AWX under User Settings > Tokens.

awx_username.title: AWX Username
awx_username.description: Username for password-based authentication (alternative to token)

awx_password.title: AWX Password
awx_password.description: Password for password-based authentication (alternative to token)

awx_verify_ssl.title: Verify SSL Certificates
awx_verify_ssl.description: Whether to verify SSL certificates when connecting to AWX. Set to false for self-signed certificates.

tools.name: env_list
tools.description: List all configured AWX environments

tools.name: env_set_active
tools.description: Set the active AWX environment

tools.name: env_get_active
tools.description: Get the currently active AWX environment

tools.name: env_test_connection
tools.description: Test connection to an AWX environment

tools.name: awx_system_info
tools.description: Get AWX system information (config, dashboard, settings)

tools.name: awx_organizations_list
tools.description: List AWX organizations

tools.name: awx_organization_get
tools.description: Get AWX organization by ID

tools.name: awx_credentials_list
tools.description: List AWX credentials

tools.name: awx_credential_types_list
tools.description: List AWX credential types

tools.name: awx_credential_create
tools.description: Create AWX credential

tools.name: awx_credential_delete
tools.description: Delete AWX credential

tools.name: awx_notification_templates_list
tools.description: List AWX notification templates. Shows configured notifications (Slack, email, webhook, etc.) and their types.

tools.name: awx_notification_template_get
tools.description: Get details of a specific AWX notification template by ID, including its type, configuration, and custom messages.

tools.name: awx_notification_template_create
tools.description: Create a new AWX notification template (Slack, email, webhook, etc.).

tools.name: awx_notification_template_test
tools.description: Send a test notification from a notification template. Useful for verifying the template configuration (Slack channel, webhook URL, etc.) is working.

tools.name: awx_notifications_list
tools.description: List sent notification history/delivery log. Shows notification status (pending, successful, failed), recipients, and errors. Can filter by notification template or status.

tools.name: awx_notification_template_update
tools.description: Update an existing AWX notification template. Only provided fields are changed (partial update).

tools.name: awx_notification_template_delete
tools.description: Delete an AWX notification template.

tools.name: awx_job_template_notifications_list
tools.description: List notification templates associated with a job template, showing which notifications fire on started, success, and error events.

tools.name: awx_job_template_notification_associate
tools.description: Associate/attach a notification template to a job template for a specific event (started, success, or error).

tools.name: awx_job_template_notification_disassociate
tools.description: Disassociate/remove a notification template from a job template for a specific event (started, success, or error).

tools.name: awx_workflow_template_notifications_list
tools.description: List notification templates associated with a workflow job template, showing which notifications fire on started, success, and error events.

tools.name: awx_workflow_template_notification_associate
tools.description: Associate/attach a notification template to a workflow job template for a specific event (started, success, or error).

tools.name: awx_workflow_template_notification_disassociate
tools.description: Disassociate/remove a notification template from a workflow job template for a specific event (started, success, or error).

tools.name: awx_templates_list
tools.description: List AWX job templates (NOT for recent jobs or job history). Templates are playbook definitions, configurations, settings. This shows available templates to run, not execution history or recent act...

tools.name: awx_template_create
tools.description: Create AWX job template

tools.name: awx_template_delete
tools.description: Delete AWX job template

tools.name: awx_projects_list
tools.description: List AWX projects

tools.name: awx_project_create
tools.description: Create AWX project

tools.name: awx_project_delete
tools.description: Delete AWX project

tools.description: List AWX inventories

tools.description: Create group in AWX inventory

tools.description: Delete group from AWX inventory

tools.description: List hosts in AWX inventory

tools.name: awx_project_update
tools.description: Update AWX project from SCM

tools.name: awx_job_launch
tools.description: Launch/execute/run/start a new AWX job from a template. Creates a new job execution instance.

tools.name: awx_job_get
tools.description: Get specific AWX job metadata and summary details including status, timing, template info, and playbook name. Use this to check a single job's current state, whether it succeeded or failed, and its...

tools.name: awx_jobs_list
tools.description: Show/list/display/view recent AWX jobs, job execution history, completed jobs, running jobs, failed jobs, job status, job runs, playbook executions. Use this when user asks to 'show recent jobs', '...

tools.name: awx_job_cancel
tools.description: Cancel/stop/abort a currently running AWX job execution. Use this when user asks to 'cancel job', 'stop job', 'abort job', 'kill job', or any request to halt a running job.

tools.name: awx_job_delete
tools.description: Delete/remove an AWX job record from history. Use this when user asks to 'delete job', 'remove job', 'clean up job', or any request to permanently remove a job record.

tools.name: awx_job_stdout
tools.description: Show/display/view/get the console output, stdout, logs, or terminal output of an AWX job execution. Use this when user asks to 'show job output', 'view job logs', 'display console output', 'get job...

tools.name: awx_job_events
tools.description: Show/list/view/get detailed events, tasks, plays, and execution steps of an AWX job. Use this when user asks to 'show job events', 'view job tasks', 'list execution steps', 'see what tasks ran', 's...

tools.name: awx_job_failure_summary
tools.description: Analyze/diagnose/debug/troubleshoot why an AWX job failed and get actionable fix suggestions. Use this when user asks 'why did job fail', 'analyze failure', 'debug job error', 'show failure summary...

tools.name: awx_workflow_templates_list
tools.description: List AWX workflow job templates. Workflow templates define multi-step automation pipelines that chain multiple job templates together. Use this when user asks to 'list workflows', 'show workflow te...

tools.name: awx_workflow_template_get
tools.description: Get details of a specific AWX workflow job template by ID, including its configuration, launch options, schedule info, and status.

tools.name: awx_workflow_job_launch
tools.description: Launch/execute/run a workflow job from a workflow job template. Creates a new workflow job that orchestrates multiple steps.

tools.name: awx_workflow_job_get
tools.description: Get status and details of a specific AWX workflow job execution, including timing, launch type, and failure explanation.

tools.name: awx_workflow_jobs_list
tools.description: List recent AWX workflow job executions and their statuses. Use this to see workflow run history.

tools.name: awx_workflow_job_cancel
tools.description: Cancel/stop a running AWX workflow job execution.

tools.name: awx_workflow_job_nodes
tools.description: Get the individual step/node details of an AWX workflow job execution. Shows each node's job template, status, elapsed time, and connection graph (success/failure/always paths). Use this to see whi...

tools.name: awx_workflow_job_delete
tools.description: Delete an AWX workflow job record from history.

tools.name: awx_workflow_job_relaunch
tools.description: Relaunch/rerun a previous AWX workflow job execution. Creates a new workflow job from the same template with the same parameters.

tools.name: awx_workflow_template_nodes
tools.description: Get the workflow job template node definitions â the graph of steps that make up the workflow template. Shows which job templates/projects/inventory sources are chained together and how (success/...

tools.name: awx_workflow_template_survey
tools.description: Get the survey spec for a workflow job template. Shows survey questions that are prompted when launching the workflow.

tools.name: awx_workflow_template_schedules
tools.description: List schedules configured for a workflow job template. Shows when the workflow is set to run automatically.

tools.name: awx_workflow_template_launch_config
tools.description: Get the launch configuration for a workflow job template. Shows which fields can be prompted on launch (inventory, limit, variables, etc.) and their defaults.

tools.name: create_playbook

tools.name: validate_playbook
tools.description: Validate/check/lint Ansible playbook syntax using ansible-playbook --syntax-check. Use this when user asks to 'validate playbook', 'check playbook syntax', 'lint playbook', 'verify playbook', or wa...

tools.name: ansible_playbook
tools.description: Execute/run an Ansible playbook locally for development and testing. Use this when user asks to 'run playbook locally', 'execute playbook', 'test playbook', 'dry-run playbook', or wants to run a pl...

tools.name: ansible_task
tools.description: Run an ad-hoc Ansible task/module locally. Use this when user asks to 'run ansible module', 'execute ad-hoc task', 'ping hosts', 'run shell command with ansible', 'test ansible module', or wants to...

tools.name: ansible_role
tools.description: Execute/run an Ansible role locally by generating a temporary playbook. Use this when user asks to 'run a role', 'execute role', 'test role locally', or wants to apply a specific role from their pr...

tools.name: create_role_structure
tools.description: Scaffold/generate/create an Ansible role directory structure with standard subdirectories (tasks, handlers, templates, files, vars, defaults, meta). Use this when user asks to 'create a role', 'sca...

tools.name: list_playbooks
tools.description: List/show/display all Ansible playbooks in the workspace or project directory. Use this when user asks to 'list playbooks', 'show my playbooks', 'what playbooks exist', 'find playbooks'.

tools.name: list_roles
tools.description: List/show/display all Ansible roles in the workspace. Use this when user asks to 'list roles', 'show my roles', 'what roles exist'.

tools.name: ansible_inventory
tools.description: List/show Ansible inventory hosts and groups using ansible-inventory. Use this when user asks to 'list inventory hosts', 'show inventory groups', 'display local inventory', 'what hosts are in my in...

tools.name: register_project
tools.description: Register/add a local Ansible project directory for easy reuse. Use this when user asks to 'register project', 'add project', 'set up project', 'configure my ansible project'. Auto-detects git remot...

tools.name: unregister_project
tools.description: Remove/unregister a local Ansible project from the registry. Use when user asks to 'remove project', 'unregister project', 'delete project registration'.

tools.name: list_registered_projects
tools.description: List/show all registered local Ansible projects and the default. Use this when user asks to 'list my projects', 'show registered projects', 'what projects are configured'.

tools.name: project_playbooks
tools.description: Discover/find/list playbooks and roles under a registered project root. Use this when user asks to 'show project playbooks', 'find playbooks in project', 'discover playbooks', 'what playbooks does...

tools.name: project_run_playbook
tools.description: Run a playbook using a registered project's inventory and environment. Use this when user asks to 'run project playbook', 'execute playbook from project', 'test project playbook locally'. Automatic...

tools.name: git_push_project
tools.description: Stage, commit, and push project changes to git remote (GitHub/GitLab). Use this when user asks to 'push to git', 'commit and push', 'push playbook changes', 'push project to github', 'publish chang...
